chooseResponse.q: What did you think of the lecture?

conversation.transcript:
Student: Hey, did you finish the group project?
Classmate: Yeah, I just submitted it this morning.
Student: That's great! How did it go?
Classmate: It went well, but we had some disagreements about the approach.

questions.explain: 同學提到他早上提交了小組項目。

questions.q: What was a challenge in the project?
questions.explain: 同學提到他們在項目中有一些分歧。

announcement.transcript: Attention students: The library will be closed this Saturday for maintenance. Please plan accordingly and return any books before then. Thank you for your understanding.

questions.q: Why will the library be closed?
questions.explain: 圖書館將於本週六關閉，因為要進行維護。

options: By the end of the month
questions.explain: 學生需要在週六之前歸還書籍。

talk.transcript: Today, I will discuss the importance of biodiversity in ecosystems. Biodiversity refers to the variety of life in a particular habitat or ecosystem. A rich biodiversity ensures natural sustainability for all life forms. It promotes resilience, allowing ecosystems to recover from disturbances and adapt to changes. Furthermore, diverse ecosystems provide essential services, such as clean air and water, pollination of plants, and regulation of the climate. Protecting biodiversity is crucial because it supports the ecosystem's health and stability, which ultimately benefits humans as well.

questions.explain: 生物多樣性是指特定生境或生態系統中的生命多樣性。
生物多樣性確保了所有生命形式的自然可持續性。

questions.q: What is a benefit of diverse ecosystems mentioned?
questions.explain: 多樣化的生態系統有助於調節氣候。
生物多樣性促進生態系統的韌性，使其能夠從擾動中恢復。
